gaps: ui-mockup writes per-page seed hints (complexity_factors, risk_baseline, acceptance_criteria_ids, cascade_chain, wizard_steps) into mockup_list.json specifically so qa-create-scenario can avoid re-scanning code, but qa-create-scenario never reads mockup_list.json — it recomputes complexity_factors from its own codebase scan, so the entire seed-hint contract is dead and the documented token-saving benefit is never realized.

The 3-way AC/UC traceability link is broken at two points: (1) ui-mockup pages emit acceptance_criteria_ids[] but never any UC reference, so the UC leg is never seeded at the mockup layer; (2) qa-trace derives UC linkage from regex over requirements markdown and never reads the structured scenarios[].use_case_id field that SDD /sync-with-qa-tracker writes, so the use_case_id field is written-but-unread within qa-ui-test.

The long-running -> system-design-doc pending_updates handoff is asymmetric: /add-feature and /edit-feature write design_doc_refs.pending_updates[] entries with type/spec/rationale and route the user to /sync-with-features, but SDD /sync-with-features only reconciles api_ref/entity_ref/diagram_refs and has no documented step that parses the pending_updates[] entry shape; the cross-plugin round-trip is recorded as never tested (INTEGRATION_TEST Scenario 7 skipped, Run History empty).

system-design-doc -> dotnet-dev is documented as an Entities->C#-models / Data-Dictionary->migrations handoff but is conceptual only: dotnet-dev contains no instruction to read .design-docs/design_doc_list.json, so nothing operationalizes deriving EF entity classes from the registered design doc.

brain is 100% dependent on the external graph-brain MCP server but the brain plugin.json bundles no mcpServers entry and ships no README/prerequisites, so a fresh marketplace install yields a hook + 14 skills that silently fail until the user manually configures the server — and every consumer edge (ui-mockup, long-running, flow-discovery) inherits that fragility.

ui-mockup and long-running reference brain MCP tools by bare names (search-knowledge, get-knowledge, explore-graph) rather than the fully-qualified mcp__graph-brain__* identifiers the runtime exposes, leaving the brain edges unverifiable in a static audit and potentially mis-invoked at runtime.

qa-ui-test has no brain integration at all, so QA scenario/risk knowledge never feeds the project knowledge graph and brain knowledge never seeds test scenarios, even though both layers reason about the same modules/pages.

brain participates in none of the shared JSON artifact contracts, so brain-held knowledge (nav structure, design decisions, recurring bugs) is invisible to the qa-trace / nfr-check / qa-coverage-check release-gate machinery.

recommendations.title: Make qa-create-scenario consume mockup_list.json seed hints (fix the only fully-broken edge)
recommendations.detail: Add a Mode/Step in plugins/qa-ui-test/commands/qa-create-scenario.md that, before code-scanning, checks for .mockups/mockup_list.json and reads pages[].complexity_factors/risk_baseline/acceptance_criteria_ids/cascade_chain/wizard_steps as seed hints (matching page.id/name to the target page), falling back to its own scan when absent. This activates the contract ui-mockup already writes (init-mockup.md:293, mockup_list.json:398) and delivers the documented re-scan savings. Both templates already agree on field names; only the consumer read is missing.

recommendations.title: Close the UC leg of the 3-way AC/UC traceability link
recommendations.detail: Two coordinated edits: (1) in plugins/qa-ui-test/commands/qa-trace.md, read scenarios[].use_case_id as a first-class UC source (the field SDD /sync-with-qa-tracker Step 5 already populates) instead of relying solely on the UC-\d regex, so the structured field stops being write-only; (2) in plugins/ui-mockup/commands/init-mockup.md Step 3.55, optionally emit a use_case reference per page (match design_doc_list use_cases[]/uc_ref to page) so the UC leg is seeded at the mockup layer too.

recommendations.title: Operationalize or downgrade the pending_updates round-trip and run INTEGRATION_TEST Scenario 7
recommendations.detail: Add an explicit step in plugins/system-design-doc/commands/sync-with-features.md that reads feature.design_doc_refs.pending_updates[] (type/spec/rationale) and applies/acknowledges each action, then execute INTEGRATION_TEST.md Scenario 7 end-to-end and record the result in the empty Run History section. Until that contract is parsed on the SDD side and tested, the add/edit-feature -> /sync-with-features handoff stays partial despite both plugins shipping the field.

recommendations.title: Bundle or document the graph-brain MCP server in the brain plugin
recommendations.detail: Add an mcpServers entry to plugins/brain/.claude-plugin/plugin.json (or a .mcp.json) and/or ship a brain README with a 'Prerequisites' section giving the exact 'claude mcp add graph-brain ...' command. This is the root cause that makes every brain consumer edge (ui-mockup/long-running/flow-discovery) silently degrade on a fresh install. Also have /brain-status print the expected server name for matching against 'claude mcp list'.

recommendations.title: Normalize brain MCP tool references to fully-qualified names in consumers
recommendations.detail: In plugins/ui-mockup/commands/create-html-mockup.md and plugins/long-running/commands/continue.md, reference brain tools as mcp__graph-brain__search-knowledge / __get-knowledge / __explore-graph (or document the exact runtime prefix) instead of bare search-knowledge, so the calls resolve deterministically and the edges become verifiable rather than 'unverified/partial'.

recommendations.title: Make the system-design-doc -> dotnet-dev handoff executable
recommendations.detail: Add a 'Works with' instruction to plugins/dotnet-dev/skills/dotnet-dev/SKILL.md telling the skill to check for .design-docs/design_doc_list.json and derive EF entity classes/configurations from entities[]/data-dictionary when present, turning the currently documentation-only Entities->C# mapping into an operational read. Pair with the existing long-running tech-detection invocation so .NET features flow design-doc -> code.

recommendations.title: Fix dotnet-dev microsoft-learn MCP usage docs to name real tools
recommendations.detail: In plugins/dotnet-dev/skills/dotnet-dev/SKILL.md:55-62 and references/microsoft-learn-mcp.md:207-241, replace the nonexistent 'mcp__microsoft-learn__search' tool and the mcporter CLI fallback with the bundled server's actual tools microsoft_docs_search / microsoft_code_sample_search / microsoft_docs_fetch (search -> code-sample -> fetch workflow). The server is bundled and loads, so the fallback premise is moot and the documented name fails in every install scenario.

recommendations.title: Widen brain SessionStart matcher and add a qa-ui-test <-> brain touchpoint
recommendations.detail: Add 'clear' (and optionally 'compact') to plugins/brain/hooks/hooks.json matcher so Brain First survives /clear. Separately, consider a lightweight qa-ui-test -> brain save (recurring failures / risk baselines) and a brain query in qa-create-scenario, since qa-ui-test is the only workflow plugin with zero brain coupling while reasoning over the same modules.
